summary:
Water has a bent molecular geometry and polar O-H bonds, creating a net permanent dipole; other options—oxygen, helium, and liquid nitrogen—are inherently nonpolar due to symmetry or absence of electronegativity differences.  

$$\boxed{\text{D}}$$

$$\boxed{\text{D}}$$. Answer choice: D
